# `latam-spanish` — latam-spanish templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Language:** es-419  ·  **Templates:** 4

Spanish-language (LATAM) phishing simulation templates for Spanish-speaking enterprise environments. Scenarios include Microsoft 365 account security, banking alerts, IT helpdesk password resets, and tax-authority (SAT) impersonation.

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Microsoft 365 – Cuenta Bloqueada | [`microsoft365_corporativo.html`](microsoft365_corporativo.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 40-60% |
| Alerta de Seguridad Bancaria | [`notificacion_bancaria.html`](notificacion_bancaria.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 40-60% |
| Soporte TI – Restablecer Contraseña | [`helpdesk_ti.html`](helpdesk_ti.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 50-70% |
| SAT – Notificación Fiscal | [`sat_notificacion.html`](sat_notificacion.html) | credential_harvest | advanced | 30-50% |

## Template details

### Microsoft 365 – Cuenta Bloqueada

- **File:** [`microsoft365_corporativo.html`](microsoft365_corporativo.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.RId}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/latam_spanish_education.html`](education/latam_spanish_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Acción requerida: su cuenta de Microsoft 365 fue bloqueada
  - Actividad de inicio de sesión inusual en su cuenta
  - Verifique su cuenta de Microsoft 365 para evitar la suspensión
- **Operator notes:** Parallels the Portuguese Microsoft 365 template. Universal Microsoft 365 lure for Spanish-speaking staff.

### Alerta de Seguridad Bancaria

- **File:** [`notificacion_bancaria.html`](notificacion_bancaria.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/latam_spanish_education.html`](education/latam_spanish_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - URGENTE: acceso sospechoso detectado en su cuenta
  - Alerta de seguridad — verifique su cuenta ahora
  - Su cuenta fue bloqueada temporalmente por sospecha de fraude
- **Operator notes:** Generic bank-security alert (no specific bank named) so it works across LATAM markets.

### Soporte TI – Restablecer Contraseña

- **File:** [`helpdesk_ti.html`](helpdesk_ti.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 50-70%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.RId}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/latam_spanish_education.html`](education/latam_spanish_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Acción requerida: restablezca su contraseña corporativa
  - Su contraseña expira hoy — restablézcala ahora
  - Soporte de TI: revalidación de contraseña requerida
- **Operator notes:** IT-helpdesk password reset. Beginner difficulty, very high click rate; good baseline test.

### SAT – Notificación Fiscal

- **File:** [`sat_notificacion.html`](sat_notificacion.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** advanced · **Est. click rate:** 30-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.RId}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/latam_spanish_education.html`](education/latam_spanish_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Notificación del SAT: requerimiento pendiente
  - Acción requerida: revise su situación fiscal
  - Aviso oficial: documento fiscal pendiente de revisión
- **Operator notes:** Tax-authority (SAT, Mexico) impersonation; parallels the Portuguese Receita Federal template. Advanced — authority-based pressure.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
